project: Crystal Springs Golf Trip Playlist Generator

playlists.name: Minerals
playlists.description: Day 1. Starts with coffee-and-breakfast reggae-rock and acoustic country, builds through cruising mid-tempo into party country and feel-good rap, and closes with full-volume sing-alongs. The energy curve of an arrival day: mellow morning, loud by sundown.

songs.title: I Just Wanna Love U (Give It 2 Me)

songs.artist: HARDY feat. Lauren Alaina & Devin Dawson
songs.title: One Beer

songs.artist: Morgan Wallen feat. Florida Georgia Line
songs.title: Up Down

songs.artist: Busta Rhymes feat. P. Diddy & Pharrell
songs.title: Pass the Courvoisier, Part II
You Give Love a Bad Name

playlists.name: Ballyowen
playlists.description: Day 2, big golf day. Pure confidence: strutting rock openers, swagger rap, and party country. Blue skies, good swings, no doubts. Heavier on rock and country as requested, with rap for the walk to the first tee.

songs.title: Ain't No Rest for the Wicked

songs.artist: Snoop Dogg & Wiz Khalifa feat. Bruno Mars
songs.title: Young, Wild & Free

songs.artist: Mike Jones feat. Slim Thug & Paul Wall
songs.title: Still Tippin'
Fell in Love with a Girl
The Devil Went Down to Georgia

playlists.name: Wild Turkey
playlists.description: The rowdiest day. Rap-heavy wall-to-wall bangers — Ruff Ryders to crunk to Shady Records — cut with loud rock and party country so it never flatlines. Built for trash talk, press bets, and volume.

songs.artist: Lil Jon & The East Side Boyz feat. Ying Yang Twins
songs.title: Get Low

songs.artist: Juvenile feat. Mannie Fresh & Lil Wayne
songs.title: Back That Azz Up

songs.title: Stay Fly

songs.artist: Ja Rule feat. Fat Joe & Jadakiss
songs.title: New York

songs.artist: Waka Flocka Flame feat. Roscoe Dash & Wale
songs.title: No Hands
(You Gotta) Fight for Your Right (To Party)

songs.artist: Trick Daddy feat. Twista & Lil Jon
songs.title: Let's Go

songs.artist: The Notorious B.I.G. feat. Bone Thugs-N-Harmony
songs.title: Notorious Thugs

songs.artist: Kanye West feat. Big Sean, Pusha T & 2 Chainz
songs.title: Mercy

songs.artist: Twista feat. Kanye West & Jamie Foxx
songs.title: Slow Jamz

songs.artist: DJ Khaled feat. T-Pain, Ludacris, Snoop Dogg & Rick Ross
songs.title: All I Do Is Win

playlists.name: Crystal Springs
playlists.description: The peak playlist. Every track is a first-ballot hall-of-famer — the biggest songs from every genre in the rotation, sequenced so there is never a reason to touch the skip button.

songs.title: You Shook Me All Night Long
You Look Like You Love Me
As Good as I Once Was

songs.artist: The Notorious B.I.G. feat. Mase & Puff Daddy
songs.title: Mo Money Mo Problems
X Gon' Give It to Ya
It's a Great Day to Be Alive

playlists.name: Cascades
playlists.description: Late afternoon, drinks flowing, sun getting low. Country comes back and classic rock takes over — warm, melodic, feel-good songs for the patio and the last few holes of daylight.

songs.title: Have You Ever Seen the Rain
You Don't Know How It Feels

playlists.name: Black Bear
playlists.description: Final round. Nostalgia-loaded — the 90s and 2000s songs everyone grew up on, building to an emotional big finish. Ends with the song that ends everything.

songs.title: She Got the Best of Me

songs.artist: Fort Minor feat. Styles of Beyond
songs.title: Remember the Name
If I Ruled the World (Imagine That)
A Life Where We Work Out
Ain't Goin' Down ('Til the Sun Comes Up)
This Is How We Do It

playlists.name: Airbnb Morning
playlists.description: Slow starts. Acoustic country, coffee-shop reggae-rock, and warm folk for eggs, hangovers, and the first cup. Nothing louder than the griddle until the last few tracks ease the day open.

songs.title: Waiting on the World to Change

playlists.name: Airbnb Evening
playlists.description: The long night: dinner-and-drinks groove, a money-and-cards rap run for the gambling hours, a rowdy peak, then the fire pit sing-along run — the songs four guys yell at a fire at 1am.

songs.title: No Shoes, No Shirt, No Problems
Heart of the City (Ain't No Love)

songs.artist: Zac Brown Band feat. Jimmy Buffett
songs.title: Knee Deep

songs.artist: Puff Daddy feat. Ma$e & The Notorious B.I.G.
songs.title: It's All About the Benjamins
All My Rowdy Friends Are Coming Over Tonight

songs.artist: Nelly feat. Paul Wall, Ali & Gipp
songs.title: Grillz
Here's a Quarter (Call Someone Who Cares)

songs.artist: Zach Bryan feat. The War and Treaty
songs.title: Hey Driver
All These Things That I've Done
One More Chance (Stay with Me Remix)
You Never Even Called Me by My Name

playlists.name: Trip Anthem
playlists.theme: The Crystal Springs Golf Trip Soundtrack
playlists.description: The highlight reel. Opens like pulling out of the driveway, peaks like the trip in full swing, and closes like the drive home with the windows down. Every song passes the test: 'YES. This song was made for this trip.'

songs.artist: Dr. Dre feat. Snoop Dogg, Kurupt & Nate Dogg
songs.title: The Next Episode
That Was a Crazy Game of Poker

playlists.name: The Ride Up
playlists.description: The drive up. Wall-to-wall amped-up sing-along rap — every chorus is a group shout and every verse somebody in the car knows word-for-word. Eminem-heavy on purpose: ten Shady-family cuts plus five more tracks he guests on. Opens full-send, detours through the old-school belt-it-out block, and pulls into the resort on Not Afraid.
